name: Smart RGB Sunset Lamp
tagline: Transform any corner into a golden-hour vibe zone
description: This viral sunset projection lamp casts a warm, photogenic glow across your walls and ceiling. Features 16 RGB color modes, 360-degree rotation head, USB-C powered, and a whisper-quiet motor. Perfect for content creators, cozy desk setups, and ambient room lighting.

image.alt: Warm sunset lamp projecting golden ambient light in a cozy room setup

name: Minimalist Magnetic Cable Organizer
tagline: Declutter your desk. Elevate your workflow.
description: Crafted from premium aerospace-grade aluminum with powerful N52 neodymium magnets, this cable organizer keeps up to 5 cables perfectly aligned and instantly accessible. The weighted silicone base grips any surface without adhesive. A must-have for minimalist desk setups.

image.alt: Clean minimalist desk setup with organized cables and accessories

name: Ambient Digital RGB Clock
tagline: Time meets art. Your desk's new centerpiece.
description: A stunning 3D holographic-style LED digital clock with ambient mirror display. Shows time, temperature, humidity, and date with customizable brightness levels. The frameless mirror finish doubles as a sleek desk accent when off. Voice-activated or touch-controlled.

image.alt: Modern LED digital clock with glowing display on a sleek desk
